InstructionData.Title: HVAC AC Radiator Controller 1
InstructionData.Description: prone to pipe burts if controller loses power​
InstructionData.Author: Scriptslol
InstructionData.Instructions:
#################################################### # HVAC AC Radiator Controller 1 #################################################### alias coolingInfo d0 alias wasteInfo d1 alias coolingValve d2 alias coolingFlushPump d3 alias heatingValve d4
define maxTemp 273.15 #305 # 30c define minTemp 273.15 #293 # 20c
alias currentTemp r1
loop:
l currentTemp wasteInfo Temperature
jal updateCooling jal updateHeating
j loop
updateCooling:
# check if the waste pipe is too hot sgt r0 currentTemp maxTemp
# check if the cooling valve should be open/close s coolingValve On r0
# manage the flush pump to prevent bursts l r0 coolingInfo TotalMoles sgtz r0 r0 s coolingFlushPump On r0
j ra
updateHeating:
# check if the waste pipe is too cold slt r0 currentTemp minTemp
s heatingValve On r0
j ra
